hero.subTagline: Performance without custody. Control without compromise.

intro.body: Pado is a high-performance, self-custodial financial platform that unifies trading, lending, payments, and contextual finance into a single onchain account. Built on Nasun — an object-oriented, Move-based Layer 1 optimized for parallel execution — Pado delivers exchange-grade performance while preserving full user control, transparency, and deterministic risk enforcement.
intro.valueProps: Instead of forcing users to fragment capital and decision-making across multiple protocols, wallets, and external social channels, Pado introduces one smart account governed by a unified risk engine — where capital earns yield, backs trades, remains instantly usable across products, and operates within a shared financial context.

problem.title: Why Pado Exists
problem.intro: Modern DeFi is powerful — but fragmented.

points.title: Fragmented Capital
points.description: Users manage multiple wallets and lock capital into isolated pools for trading, lending, or payments — reducing capital efficiency and increasing operational risk.

points.title: Protocol Sprawl
points.description: Each DeFi vertical — DEXs, perpetuals, lending protocols, staking — operates in isolation, forcing users to bridge liquidity and accept inconsistent custody assumptions.

points.title: Context Switching
points.description: Strategy discussion, market analysis, and coordination happen off-platform — on X, Discord, and Telegram — far removed from execution. By the time insight becomes action, the opportunity is often gone.

points.title: No Shared Financial Context
points.description: Existing platforms separate execution from information. Users constantly switch between trading interfaces and external channels to learn, coordinate, and compete.

problem.closing: Pado consolidates these functions into a single onchain financial system — allowing users to trade, lend, borrow, pay, and interact from one account with shared collateral, deterministic risk management, and embedded financial context.

coreInnovation.title: The Core Innovation
coreInnovation.subtitle: One Account, One Risk Engine
coreInnovation.intro: At the center of Pado is a Smart Account Object that represents a user's complete financial state.

features.title: Portfolio-Level Risk
features.description: All assets, positions, and liabilities are evaluated at the portfolio level — not per protocol, not per product.

features.title: Deterministic Enforcement
features.description: Risk is enforced deterministically onchain — no discretionary liquidations, no hidden rules. The rules are the same for everyone.

features.title: Yield on Collateral
features.description: Capital is designed to earn yield while simultaneously backing leveraged positions — enabling capital efficiency previously only available in centralized exchanges.

coreInnovation.closing: This architecture delivers centralized-exchange capital efficiency — without custody, opaque controls, or fragmented workflows.

performance.title: Built for Performance at Scale
performance.intro: Pado leverages Nasun's object-oriented execution model to eliminate global state bottlenecks.

features.title: Parallel Execution
features.description: Independent assets and accounts process simultaneously — high throughput across multiple markets without network-wide contention.

features.title: Atomic Transactions
features.description: Multi-step strategies execute as one guaranteed outcome. Supply collateral, open positions, and transfer funds — all at once, all or nothing.

performance.closing: Assets, positions, and markets are modeled as programmable objects, allowing Pado to scale across products and users without sacrificing safety or composability.

trading.title: Trading
features: Spot and perpetual markets from the same account
Portfolio-level margin for advanced users
Deterministic, transparent liquidation rules

lending.title: Lending & Borrowing
features: Idle assets designed to automatically earn yield
Instant borrowing against existing balances
No separate deposits or protocol interactions

prediction.title: Prediction Markets
features: YES/NO outcome orderbooks with real-time settlement
Create and trade on any verifiable event
Transparent odds driven by market participants

lottery.title: Weekly Lottery
features: Verifiable randomness powered by Sui Random
Transparent prize pools and draw mechanics
Participate directly from your unified account

payments.title: Payments
features: Stablecoins remain liquid and usable at all times
Borrow or transfer directly from the same account
Capital is never locked into silos — it remains continuously productive

riskModes.title: Risk Modes for Every User
riskModes.intro: Pado allows users to opt into sophistication at their own pace.

modes.title: Safe Mode
modes.label: Default
features: Isolated margin — each trade stands alone
No leverage
Ideal for new users

modes.title: Pro Mode
modes.label: Opt-In
features: Cross-product collateral
Portfolio margin
Yield on collateral backing positions

modes.title: Institutional Mode
modes.label: Verified
features: Custom margin parameters
API access
Advanced asset support

riskModes.closing: All modes are enforced by the same onchain risk engine, ensuring fairness, predictability, and transparency across participants.

contextualFinance.title: Contextual Finance
contextualFinance.subtitle: The Social Layer for Serious Capital
contextualFinance.intro: Finance is inherently social — traders compare performance, share strategies, learn from peers, and compete. Today, these interactions happen outside the execution layer, across disconnected social platforms with no shared context, no verification, and no safety rails.
contextualFinance.inversion: Pado inverts this model. Instead of injecting financial mechanics into social feeds, Pado embeds optional, high-signal social surfaces directly into the financial execution layer — eliminating context switching while preserving privacy and focus.
contextualFinance.designPrinciple: Social features must make users better traders, better allocators, or better learners. If they don't, they don't ship.

features.title: War Rooms
features.description: Position-gated discussion spaces (e.g. ETH longs, yield strategies) designed to filter noise through skin-in-the-game participation.

features.title: Privacy-First Leaderboards
features.description: Risk-adjusted, ZKP-verified performance rankings — anonymous by default, opt-in public exposure. Designed to reward discipline over speculation.

features.title: Secure Messaging
features.description: Encrypted, self-custodial DMs and strategy sharing with built-in risk controls. No forced exposure, no open spam channels.

features.title: AI Agents as Financial Tools
features.description: Clearly labeled AI agents operate within strict permissions to add context — not distraction:
bullets: Risk alerts and margin health monitoring

contextualFinance.liveNow: Live today: global chat with signature-based authentication, integrated directly into the trading interface.
contextualFinance.closing: Social features scale with risk modes — educational in Safe Mode, performance-oriented in Pro Mode, and private, team-based in Institutional Mode. Pado becomes not just where capital is deployed — but where financial decisions are made.

intentBased.title: Intent-Based & Agent-Ready
intentBased.subtitle: Designed for the Agentic Future
intentBased.intro: Pado introduces an intent-based execution layer that allows users (or autonomous agents) to express financial goals rather than manual transactions.
intentBased.example: "Maintain a 5% yield on my stablecoins while keeping my ETH position above a 1.6x health factor."

features.title: Solver Network
features.description: A decentralized solver network designed to compete to fulfill intents, executing them atomically onchain.

features.title: Atomic Settlement
features.description: If the outcome doesn't meet the user's signed intent, the transaction fails — protecting users from partial execution and slippage.

features.title: Scoped Permissions
features.description: Users can issue limited-power keys to autonomous agents — restricted by risk guardrails, with no custody or unrestricted access.

bridging.title: Secure Asset Bridging
bridging.intro: Pado is designed to support external assets via Nasun's native bridge infrastructure:
features: Assets locked on source chains via audited smart contracts
1:1 Nasun-native representations issued as onchain objects
Secured by the same validator set that secures the network
bridging.closing: All bridge logic will be open-source and auditable, with balances and issuance verifiable onchain.

economic.title: Economic Model
bullets: Competitive trading fees with volume-based discounts
Protocol-sponsored gas for core financial actions
Sustainable fee structure designed to scale with usage
economic.insurance: An onchain insurance fund absorbs protocol-level risk during extreme market events — protecting users from systemic failures while preserving individual accountability.

positioning.title: Market Positioning
positioning.intro: Pado sits at the intersection of high-performance onchain trading, capital-efficient lending, stablecoin-based payments, contextual community-driven finance, and emerging real-world asset tokenization.
positioning.closing: Rather than competing as a single-product protocol, Pado is designed as the unified financial layer where these markets — and their participants — converge.

launchStatus.title: Launch Status
launchStatus.intro: Pado Alpha is live on Nasun devnet.

live.title: Unified Smart Account
live.description: Sign in with Google via zkLogin. No seed phrases.

live.title: Spot Trading
live.description: DeepBook V3 CLOB with NBTC/NUSDC and NASUN/NUSDC pairs.

live.title: Prediction Markets
live.description: YES/NO outcome orderbooks with real-time settlement.

live.title: Live Chat
live.description: WebSocket-based chat integrated into the trading interface.

live.title: Portfolio Dashboard
live.description: Unified view of all assets, positions, and activity.

coming.title: Perpetual Futures
coming.description: Contracts deployed. UI built. Activation imminent.

coming.title: Lending Markets
coming.description: Earn yield on idle assets. Contracts deployed.

coming.title: Cross-Chain Bridge
coming.description: Bring assets from Ethereum and other major chains.

coming.title: Contextual Finance Features
coming.description: War rooms, leaderboards, and social coordination tools.

cta.title: The Opportunity
cta.body: As DeFi matures, users are migrating toward platforms that offer fewer accounts, shared collateral, transparent deterministic risk, and integrated execution and decision-making. Pado is built for this transition.
cta.tagline: One account. One margin system. One execution layer.
cta.closing: A financial platform designed for scale, safety, capital efficiency — and context.
cta.motto: Start simple. Grow sophisticated. Always in control.
